violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the beverage coolers have an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023
The receptacle in the unisex toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023

The floors in back storage area and walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023
